rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи, взиваю» - 6 стихир свщмч., Сл.: свщмч., І нині: богородичний-догмат 1-го гласу. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар свщмч., Сл., І нині: богород. воскресний за гласом тропаря свщмч. Відпуст великий з помин. цілого тижня і свщмч.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар свщмч. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. воскресний за гласом тропаря свщмч. Катизми чергові, сідальні Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канон: якщо Господній або Богородичний храм, то – канон храму, свщмч. та Октоїха. Якщо храм святого, то канон свщмч., храмового святого та Октоїха. По 9-ій пісні – світильний Октоїха, Сл.: свщмч., І нині: його богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар свщмч., Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря свщмч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст великий з помин. усього тижня і свщмч.
Часи: на 1-му – тропар і кондак дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му та 9-му – свщмч.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – 1 Кор. 164 зач.; 15, 58 – 16, 3. Єв. – Лк. 19 зач.; 5, 17-26.

troparion_en.text: Having learned goodness and maintaining continence in all things, / you were arrayed with a good conscience as befits a priest. / From the chosen Vessel you drew ineffable mysteries; / you kept the faith, and finished a course equal to His. / Bishop martyr Dionysius, entreat Christ God that our souls may be saved.

kontakion_en.text: As a disciple of the apostle caught up to the third heaven, / you spiritually entered the gate of heaven, Dionysius. / You were enriched with understanding of ineffable mysteries / and enlightened those who sat in the darkness of ignorance. / Therefore we cry to you: Rejoice, universal Father!

matched_oca_saint: Hieromartyr Dionysius the Areopagite, Bishop of Athens

oca_saints.name: Hieromartyr Dionysius the Areopagite, Bishop of Athens

troparion.text: Having learned goodness and maintaining continence in all things, / you were arrayed with a good conscience as befits a priest. / From the chosen Vessel you drew ineffable mysteries; / you kept the faith, and finished a course equal to His. / Bishop martyr Dionysius, entreat Christ God that our souls may be saved.

kontakion.text: As a disciple of the apostle caught up to the third heaven, / you spiritually entered the gate of heaven, Dionysius. / You were enriched with understanding of ineffable mysteries / and enlightened those who sat in the darkness of ignorance. / Therefore we cry to you: Rejoice, universal Father!

oca_saints.name: Martyrs Rusticus the Presbyter and Eleutherius the Deacon

troparion.text: O God of our Fathers, / always act with kindness towards us; / take not Your mercy from us, / but guide our lives in peace / through the prayers of Rusticus and Eleutherius.

oca_saints.name: Venerable Dionysius the Recluse of the Kiev Caves

troparion.text: You offered the Bloodless Sacrifice to the Lord blamelessly,  / and served Him diligently according to your calling. /  O Saint Dionysios, pray for us who revere you with love.

oca_saints.name: Saint John the Chozebite, Bishop of Caesarea, Palestine

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father John, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Hesychius, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!
